terms.intro1: Please read the merchant onboarding and deposit terms below in full.
terms.intro2: You may submit the merchant application only after scrolling to the bottom and agreeing.
terms.agreePrefix: I have read and agree to
terms.scrollTip: Scroll to the bottom of the terms first

section1.title: 1. Merchant eligibility and responsibility
section1.content: Applicants must provide true, complete, and lawful information and have legal capacity and required qualifications. False information or missing qualifications may lead to termination and liability.

section2.title: 2. Compliance and consumer protection
section2.content: Merchants must comply with applicable laws, avoid prohibited or infringing goods, and handle orders, after-sales, and complaints promptly.

section3.title: 3. Deposit rules
section3.content: Merchants must pay the required deposit as performance and risk coverage. The platform may deduct part or all of the deposit for fraud, breach, or infringement.

section4.title: 4. Data and privacy
section4.content: User data may be used only for lawful order fulfillment and support. Merchants must protect data and prevent leakage or misuse.

section5.title: 5. Platform governance
section5.content: The platform may supervise merchant behavior and take warnings, delisting, freezing, or removal actions. Suspected illegal activity may be reported to authorities.

section6.title: 6. Disputes and updates
section6.content: Disputes should be resolved through negotiation first, then the published dispute mechanism. Terms may be updated with notice.

security.title: Security
security.scoreSuggestion: Your account security is medium. Consider enabling more protections.
security.scoreSuggestionLow: Your account security is low. Please improve security settings as soon as possible.
security.scoreSuggestionMedium: Your account security is medium. Consider enabling more protections.
security.scoreSuggestionHigh: Your account security is high. Keep up the good security habits.
security.transactionConfirmationDesc: Confirm transaction details before each transaction
security.highValueAlertDesc: Warn when transaction amount exceeds threshold
security.contractInteractionWarningDesc: Show risk warnings when interacting with smart contracts
security.twoFactorDesc: Use Google Authenticator or other authenticator apps
security.autoLockDesc: Auto-lock wallet after period of inactivity
security.addressWhitelistDesc: Only allow transfers to whitelisted addresses when enabled
security.freezeAccountDesc: If you suspect suspicious activity or your wallet is compromised, you can freeze your account immediately.
security.accountRecoveryDesc: Set up recovery options to regain access in emergency situations.

modal.twoFactorStep1: Download and install one of the following authenticator apps on your phone:
modal.twoFactorStep2: Scan the QR code with your authenticator app:
modal.twoFactorManual: If you cannot scan, enter this key manually:
modal.twoFactorStep3: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app:
modal.closeTwoFactorDesc: Disabling two-factor authentication will reduce your account security. Are you sure?
modal.freezeWarning: Warning: This will freeze your account
modal.freezeWarningDesc: After freezing, you will not be able to perform any transactions. You must contact support to unfreeze. Please confirm you really need to do this.
modal.accountFrozen: Account frozen. Please contact support to unfreeze.
modal.recoveryDesc: Choose a recovery method to regain access in emergency situations:
modal.recoveryEmailDesc: Receive recovery link via registered email
modal.recoveryPhoneDesc: Receive verification code via linked phone number
modal.recoveryMnemonicDesc: Use mnemonic phrase to recover wallet access
